workflows.name: LinkedIn / Content Workflow
workflows.summary: Turns raw ideas, transcripts, client lessons, or website topics into reviewed content drafts and lead magnet outlines.

workflows.name: Time to Revenue PDF Branding Workflow
workflows.summary: Locally renders approved Markdown sources into Time to Revenue branded PDF or HTML review files.

workflows.name: Marketing PDF Package Workflow
workflows.summary: Packages an approved marketing draft into lead magnet source Markdown and a reviewed PDF branding handoff.

workflows.name: Revenue LinkedIn Relationship Outreach Workflow
workflows.summary: Drafts relationship-first LinkedIn outreach and follow-up messages without sending or changing records.

workflows.name: Delivery / Operations Document Workflow
workflows.summary: Turns notes, transcripts, or build outputs into draft internal and client-ready operations documents.

workflows.name: Revenue Sales Prep Workflow
workflows.summary: Turns supplied prospect, website, call, or transcript notes into local sales prep drafts.

workflows.name: Marketing Content Repurposing Workflow
workflows.summary: Turns one approved source asset into reusable marketing draft options for review.

workflows.name: Delivery Client Kickoff Workflow
workflows.summary: Turns signed or likely engagement context into kickoff planning drafts without touching client systems.

workflows.name: Operations Founder Review Workflow
workflows.summary: Turns weekly notes, receipts, results, blockers, and priorities into a concise founder operating review draft.
